## Summary / 概要

- What problem does this PR solve? / 这个 PR 解决了什么问题？
- Why is this change needed? / 为什么需要这次改动？

## Changes / 变更内容

- List the main code or behavior changes / 列出主要代码或行为变化

## Validation / 验证

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Relevant manual testing completed / 已完成相关手工测试

## Notes / 备注

- Any follow-up work / 后续待做事项
- Any risk areas or known limitations / 风险点或已知限制
